name: airpods-noise-control-auto
title: AirPods Noise Control Auto
description: Auto-detecting AirPods extension that switches between Off, Transparency, Adaptive or Noise Cancellation. Automatically detects AirPods Pro vs Max and configures optimal settings.
author: sagivO2150

commands.name: index
commands.title: Sagiv's Noise Toggle
commands.subtitle: Auto-detects AirPods type • Noise Control Toggle
commands.description: Sagiv's custom auto-detecting noise control toggle for AirPods Pro/Max.

preferences.title: Preview
preferences.name: showHudNC
preferences.label: Show HUD For Noise Control
preferences.description: Show HUD feedback on noise control change.

preferences.name: airpodsType
preferences.title: AirPods Type (Auto-detected)
preferences.description: Your AirPods model will be automatically detected. This setting is for manual override only.

preferences.name: airpodsIndex
preferences.title: AirPods List Position (Auto-detected)
preferences.description: The position of your AirPods in the Sound menu will be automatically detected (defaults to position 4). This setting is for manual override only.
preferences.placeholder: Position of your AirPods in the Sound menu (1, 2, 3, ...)

preferences.name: ccLoc
preferences.title: Control Center Localization
preferences.description: What is the name of the Control Center in your language/region?

preferences.name: soundLoc
preferences.title: Sound Menu Localization
preferences.description: What is the name of the Sound menu (in Control Center) in your language/region?
